description_long: This is a compact, modern filing cabinet with a rectangular white top and a single, wide drawer featuring a light wood finish. The drawer is accessed via a recessed pull integrated into the upper edge, giving it a minimalist appearance. The cabinet stands on four angled, tapered wooden legs, which provide stability and a mid-century modern aesthetic. The sides and back of the cabinet are plain, with the back panel finished in a matching light wood tone. The overall construction appears to be a combination of engineered wood and laminate, with a smooth, matte surface. This piece is suitable for storing documents or small items and would fit well in a contemporary office or home environment.
description: A modern, single-drawer filing cabinet with a white top, light wood drawer, and angled wooden legs. Features a recessed pull and a minimalist, mid-century design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain white side panel and two angled wooden legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the single light wood drawer with a recessed pull and all four angled legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, with a plain white side panel and two legs visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain light wood back panel and all four angled legs.
